title: Dense Creamy Canadian Mushroom Pasta
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish featuring Canadian mushrooms and long-fermentation-dough, perfect for a cold winter night. This dish is FODMAP-friendly and made with heavy cream for a silky texture.

ingredients.name: mixed Canadian mushrooms
ingredients.notes: such as cremini, shiitake, and oyster

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the garlic-infused oil.
Add the mixed mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the heavy cream to the skillet and stir to combine with the mushrooms and butter.
Bring the cream mixture to a simmer and cook until it has thickened slightly.
Stir in the dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the cream mixture.
Toss the pasta in the cream mixture until it is well coated.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
